div.p: This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

ul.li: Import all the codes that are contained in DK SOR Practice Setting Code

div.p: This value set excludes codes based on the following rules:

ul.li: Import all the codes that are contained in SNOMED CT Laboratory Specialities

title.value: DK SOR Practice Setting Code excluding laboratory codes

description.value: Values used for Practice Setting, as described in the SOR registry. This list excludes Laboratory Specialties .

copyright.value: This value set includes content from SNOMED CT, which is copyright © 2002+ International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO), and distributed by agreement between IHTSDO and HL7. Implementer use of SNOMED CT is not covered by this agreement
